behavior: must obtain consent before collecting
applicability_notes: applies to entities with annual revenue > $25M
override_notes: does not apply to anonymized or aggregated data
source_excerpt: No data controller shall collect personal data without prior informed consent of the consumer.

behavior: must provide notice of data practices
override_notes: does not apply where notice is impracticable
source_excerpt: A data controller shall provide clear and conspicuous notice of its data collection practices.

behavior: must delete personal data upon request
applicability_notes: applies when consumer submits verified request
override_notes: does not apply to data required for legal compliance
source_excerpt: Upon verified request, a data controller shall delete all personal data associated with the requesting consumer.

behavior: must implement reasonable security measures
applicability_notes: applies to all data processors handling NY consumer data
source_excerpt: Every data processor shall maintain reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards.

behavior: must conduct risk assessment
applicability_notes: applies annually or when processing changes significantly
source_excerpt: Data controllers engaged in high-risk processing shall conduct and document a data protection assessment.

behavior: shall not collect additional categories of personal information
applicability_notes: applies to businesses as defined in § 1798.140(d)
override_notes: exempt if consumer provides explicit consent
source_excerpt: A business shall not collect additional categories of personal information without providing notice.

behavior: must disclose categories of personal information collected
applicability_notes: applies at or before point of collection
source_excerpt: A business shall, at or before the point of collection, inform consumers of the categories of personal information to be collected.

behavior: shall delete personal information upon request
applicability_notes: applies upon verifiable consumer request
override_notes: does not apply to 9 enumerated exceptions in § 1798.105(d)
source_excerpt: A business shall delete any personal information about the consumer which the business has collected from the consumer.

behavior: is liable for data breaches involving nonencrypted data
applicability_notes: applies when breach results from failure to maintain reasonable security
source_excerpt: Any consumer whose nonencrypted or nonredacted personal information is subject to unauthorized access may institute a civil action.

law_title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
behavior: shall limit collection of personal data
applicability_notes: applies to data that is adequate, relevant, and necessary
source_excerpt: A controller shall limit the collection of personal data to what is adequate, relevant, and reasonably necessary.

law_title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
behavior: must provide privacy notice
applicability_notes: applies to all controllers subject to this chapter
source_excerpt: A controller shall provide consumers with a reasonably accessible, clear, and meaningful privacy notice.

law_title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
behavior: must obtain consent for processing sensitive data
override_notes: exempt for data processed prior to effective date
source_excerpt: A controller shall not process sensitive data without obtaining the consumer's consent.

law_title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
behavior: shall conduct data protection assessment
target: processing activities that present heightened risk
applicability_notes: applies to targeted advertising, sale of data, and sensitive data processing
source_excerpt: A controller shall conduct and document a data protection assessment for each processing activity that presents a heightened risk of harm.

behavior: must develop written policy for retention and destruction
applicability_notes: applies to all private entities in possession of biometric data
source_excerpt: A private entity in possession of biometric identifiers or biometric information must develop a written policy.

behavior: must inform subject and obtain written release before collection
applicability_notes: applies prior to collection
override_notes: does not apply to financial institutions subject to GLBA
source_excerpt: No private entity may collect, capture, purchase, receive through trade, or otherwise obtain biometric identifiers without informed written consent.

behavior: shall not sell or otherwise profit from biometric data
source_excerpt: No private entity in possession of biometric identifiers may sell, lease, trade, or otherwise profit from the data.

behavior: shall store and transmit data using reasonable standard of care
applicability_notes: applies in a manner that is the same as or more protective than other confidential information
source_excerpt: A private entity shall store, transmit, and protect from disclosure all biometric identifiers and information using the reasonable standard of care.

behavior: must ensure lawful basis for processing
applicability_notes: applies to all processing of personal data
source_excerpt: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies.

behavior: has right to erasure of personal data
applicability_notes: applies where one of the grounds in Art. 17(1)(a)-(f) applies
override_notes: does not apply where processing is necessary per Art. 17(3)
source_excerpt: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller the erasure of personal data without undue delay.

behavior: must implement data protection by design and by default
applicability_notes: applies at the time of determination of means and at time of processing
source_excerpt: The controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures for implementing data-protection principles.

behavior: must carry out data protection impact assessment
target: processing likely to result in high risk to rights and freedoms
applicability_notes: applies where processing uses new technologies, profiling, or large-scale sensitive data
override_notes: not required where processing is on legal basis per Art. 6(1)(c) or (e) with existing impact assessment
source_excerpt: Where a type of processing is likely to result in a high risk, the controller shall carry out an assessment of the impact.

behavior: must notify supervisory authority of data breach
applicability_notes: applies without undue delay and within 72 hours
override_notes: not required if breach is unlikely to result in risk to rights and freedoms
source_excerpt: In the case of a personal data breach, the controller shall notify the supervisory authority within 72 hours.

law_title: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
behavior: must obtain meaningful consent
applicability_notes: applies to commercial activities
source_excerpt: The knowledge and consent of the individual are required for the collection, use, or disclosure of personal information.

law_title: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
behavior: may collect without knowledge or consent in limited circumstances
override_notes: permitted where collection is in the interest of the individual and consent cannot be obtained in a timely way
source_excerpt: Organizations may collect personal information without the knowledge or consent of the individual only if certain conditions are met.

law_title: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
behavior: shall not use or disclose personal information for purposes other than those collected
applicability_notes: applies unless new consent obtained or required by law
source_excerpt: Personal information shall not be used or disclosed for purposes other than those for which it was collected.

law_title: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
behavior: must protect personal information with appropriate safeguards
applicability_notes: level of protection shall be proportionate to sensitivity
source_excerpt: Personal information shall be protected by security safeguards appropriate to the sensitivity of the information.

behavior: must not engage in unlawful discrimination using personal data
applicability_notes: applies to decisions that produce legal or significant effects
source_excerpt: No data controller shall process personal data in a manner that constitutes unlawful discrimination against consumers.

behavior: must comply with automated decision-making regulations
applicability_notes: applies when regulations are finalized by the Agency
source_excerpt: The Agency shall issue regulations governing access and opt-out rights with respect to automated decision-making technology.

law_title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
behavior: has right to opt out of targeted advertising
target: personal data processed for targeted advertising
applicability_notes: applies to consumers who are Texas residents
source_excerpt: A consumer shall have the right to opt out of the processing of personal data for purposes of targeted advertising.

behavior: must disclose material terms of consumer agreements
applicability_notes: applies to agreements entered after January 1, 2025
source_excerpt: Every financial institution shall clearly and conspicuously disclose all material terms and conditions of consumer financial agreements.

behavior: must report suspected fraud to state authority
applicability_notes: applies when institution becomes aware of unauthorized access
source_excerpt: Upon discovery of unauthorized access to consumer financial data, a financial institution shall report such breach to the Department within 48 hours.

behavior: shall not transfer personal data to third country without adequate safeguards
applicability_notes: applies to transfers to third countries or international organizations
override_notes: permitted if adequate level of protection per Art. 45 or appropriate safeguards per Art. 46
source_excerpt: Any transfer of personal data to a third country shall take place only if the conditions laid down in this Chapter are complied with.

behavior: shall not sell or share sensitive personal information
applicability_notes: applies after consumer directs business to limit use
override_notes: does not apply if consumer has not exercised right to limit
source_excerpt: A business that collects a consumer's sensitive personal information shall limit use to that which is necessary.

law_title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
behavior: must respond to consumer rights requests
applicability_notes: within 45 days of receipt
override_notes: may extend by additional 45 days where reasonably necessary
source_excerpt: A controller shall respond to a consumer request without undue delay but no later than 45 days.

behavior: may transfer data to third parties only under written agreement
applicability_notes: applies to all third-party data sharing arrangements
source_excerpt: Transfer of personal data to a third party shall occur only pursuant to a written contract that ensures equivalent protections.

law_title: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
behavior: must make information about policies and practices readily available
applicability_notes: upon request
source_excerpt: An organization shall make readily available to individuals specific information about its policies and practices.
